content.en:
this day.

Ye Tian continued to fuse the copy body with the Eternal Realm Powerful Finger, and after such a long period of fusion, he gradually understood more and more about the Eternal Realm Powerful Finger, and felt more and more.

The eternal rule contained in this powerful finger of the Eternal Realm is destruction, and what he has comprehended is the endless eternal rule, which contains all kinds of eternal rules, so the rule of destruction is also of great use to him.

Moreover, the rules affect each other, and the rules of destruction will also be derived from the rules of life, and the rules of life give birth to all things, and other rules can be born.

Therefore, even if he just comprehended the Eternal Rules, he could greatly improve Ye Tian's Endless Eternal Rules.

What's more, this is a finger from the Eternal Realm, which can give him a better understanding of the life structure of the Eternal Realm, which is of great help to him in cultivating the Eternal Body.

In fact, the eternal body is the body that has been perfected step by step to ascend to the eternal realm, and if the eternal body is perfected, you can have the body of the eternal realm, although it can't exert much power, but its strength is far beyond that of the supreme of the same level.

This time, the fusion was relatively smooth, because he had already mastered the trick of fusion, and his understanding of the Eternal Destruction Rule was too deep, so there was no rejection problem in the first place.

I saw that Ye Tian's power seemed to have turned into hundreds of millions of silk threads, integrated into this finger, and slowly assimilated into this finger.

I don't know how long it has been, but finally the fusion has been successful.

This is also the first time that Ye Tian has successfully fused!

"It's done, you just need to try a little more to ensure that the fusion is 100% successful!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, before the next fusion, Ye Tian was going to test what kind of attack he could exert with the help of this Eternal Realm finger?

So, Ye Tian came to the source sea.

His gaze pointed to the distant area, and he urged his right finger to perform a fingering supreme ancestral technique.

"Broken!"

A terrifying force erupted, and the source sea area shattered like a mirror.

And after casting this blow, Ye Tian felt as if his body was about to crack, even with the recovery level of his Endless Eternal Body and the degree of life-saving, he was almost completely annihilated.

But in the end, Ye Tian survived, but was seriously injured.

"The price is too great, if the other Dual Beings or even the Triple Absolute and the Quadruple Peerless even if they are lucky enough to fuse this Eternal Realm Finger, if they dare to use this Eternal Realm Finger to attack, they will definitely die!" Ye Tian muttered.

He estimated the power of this attack, and it was very likely that it had reached the level of a normal Eightfold Realm Supreme Being, second only to the Ninefold Supreme Realm.

This is because his own strength is weak, and he can't exert too much power.

If he had risen to the Triple Supreme Realm, the power of this blow would probably be enough to exert a combat power comparable to that of the Ninefold Supreme Realm.

Of course, this trick can only be used as a hole card.

Moreover, Ye Tian decided not to let the body fuse this finger, even if it was to copy the body fusion, otherwise if the body was severely damaged, it would affect the attack, and the clone would not have to worry.

In the following days, Ye Tian disintegrated the replica body, recondensed the replica body, and began to fuse again.

In this way, the success rate of fusion is getting higher and higher, and under the study of a great tribulation time, Ye Tian has guaranteed a 100% success rate, so he stopped the fusion experiment.

Subsequently, he began to use this amputated finger to comprehend the eternal rules, the life structure of the eternal realm, and even tried to create an eternal technique.

Of course, the power of the real Eternal Technique was too terrifying, and it was difficult for him to create it, but with the help of this Eternal Realm finger, he could create a supreme technique that contained a trace of the power of the Eternal Technique, which could also be called a half-step Eternal Technique.

According to the machine spirit, the half-step Eternal Realm basically has a large number of half-step eternal techniques, and the best of them have mastered a variety of eternal techniques.

Therefore, if he wants to create a half-step eternal technique, there is still a lot of hope.

In this retreat, Ye Tian's time for enlightenment is relatively long, and he has fully comprehended a full amount of time.

During this period, the Dark Forbidden Realm fell into a great destruction, but the Terrans had other exotic worlds, so all the Terrans were transferred to other exotic worlds.

In the midst of this great destruction, another Raider was born in the Dark Forbidden Realm, but it was wiped out by the invincible Terrans.

After the great destruction, the Dark Forbidden Realm came to the next Tribulation.

A tribulation time is almost a very short time for other supreme beings, but Ye Tian's cultivation speed has been too fast, so he feels that this retreat time is very long.

The retreat time of a full tribulation yuan made Ye Tian improve in the eternal body.

It is very difficult for the Eternals to progress, unless there is a treasure like the Eternal Hedron that can be used to raise the Eternals.

But there is another way to elevate the realm of the Eternals, and that is to actively elevate the Eternals.

Basically, other supreme beings basically couldn't do this, but Ye Tian did it.

He comprehended this Eternal Realm finger, and his understanding of the Eternal Body was too deep, so he broke the shackles and forcibly raised the Eternal Body from the late stage of entry to the peak of the entry, but this is already the limit, if you want to improve to the Xiaocheng realm, it is almost impossible to do it without relying on treasures like the Eternal Tribulation Crystal.

But such an improvement is enough.

At the same time, Ye Tian also succeeded in creating a half-step eternal technique, which was a half-step eternal technique of destruction, completely imitating this section of the Eternal Realm finger.

For this half-step Eternal Technique, Ye Tian named it the Destruction Finger, once he used this Eternal Realm Finger, the power exerted was definitely no less than the real Eternal Technique.

Now, Ye Tian was able to explode an attack comparable to the realm of the Ninefold Supreme with the realm of the Double-Fold Supreme Being, but it was only the power of one blow.

After that, Ye Tian began to try to control this amputated finger, not all of which burst out of power, such as bursting out with a power comparable to that of a sixfold supreme or a sevenfold supreme, would this be less expensive and costly, so that he could exert multiple attacks?

But this Eternal Realm finger is too advanced, and it is difficult to control.

Ye Tian tried for a long time, but he could only try to exert the attack of the Sevenfold Supreme, and he could play it ten times, but he couldn't control it any further.

And after a tribulation of penance, Ye Tian's cultivation has finally reached the extreme of the Triple Supreme, and he is ready to prepare for the impact on the realm of the Triple Supreme.
